lark_bind.needs_auth_description: Sign in to Multica to complete the binding. The token in the link binds your Lark account to this Multica user, so you must be logged in first.
lark_bind.done_description: Your next message to the Bot in Lark will go straight to the Agent. You can close this tab.
lark_bind.error_admin_hint: If this keeps happening, ask the workspace admin to re-send the binding link from Lark.
lark_bind.error_missing_token: The link is missing its binding token. Ask the Bot to send a new one in Lark.
lark_bind.error_expired: This binding link is invalid or expired (links are valid for 15 minutes). Ask the Bot to send a new one.
lark_bind.error_already_bound: This Lark account is already bound to a different Multica user. Account transfers must go through an explicit unbind first.
lark_bind.error_not_member: You're signed in to a Multica account that isn't a member of this workspace.
lark_bind.error_unknown: Something went wrong. Try again, and if the problem persists, contact the workspace admin.

wecom_bind.needs_auth_description: Sign in to Multica to complete the binding.
wecom_bind.done_description: You're bound. Return to WeCom to continue chatting with the Bot.
wecom_bind.error_missing_token: The link is missing its binding token.
wecom_bind.error_mixed_content: This page is HTTPS but the API is configured as http://localhost:8080, which the browser blocks. Open the binding link on localhost on your PC.
wecom_bind.error_expired: This binding link is invalid or expired. Send the Bot a new message in WeCom to get a fresh link.
wecom_bind.error_already_bound: This WeCom account is already bound to a different Multica user.
wecom_bind.error_not_member: You're signed in to a Multica account that isn't a member of this workspace.
wecom_bind.error_unknown: Binding failed. The link may be expired or already used.
